message:
chore: sync concurrent agent improvements

- task_handle: propagate actual cancel reason instead of always race_loser
- tls/connector: add TLS connector implementation for client connections
- sync/pool: improve pool slot management
- service: refactor service module
- otel: enhance OpenTelemetry integration
- cx: improve context handling
- Add tests for cancel reason propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
